threads.subject: Gotion BESS - Construction Support and Record Drawings
threads.body_text:
CRITICAL THREAD — Gotion BESS Phase 1 CA Proposal ($380,670 / 6-month schedule). Multiple iterations 6/22–6/23. Final sequence:

6/22 21:57 Appelbaum: Attached draft proposal for Construction Support and Record Drawings (scope: review/response to RFIs, submittals, shop drawings, construction documentation for general conformance, participate in construction meetings).

6/23 16:42 Appelbaum: Updated draft — Phase 1 specified explicitly. 6-month construction schedule cap added.

6/23 19:19 Appelbaum: 'Ryan, John and I aligned on the workbook provided, $380,670 fee, as well as the language. We added specification that this is Phase 1 only and noted the schedule covers a maximum of a 6 month construction schedule. If you are good, I can put this on Clayco letterhead.' — Word doc attached.

6/23 19:37 Ryan (sent): 'Love it. Let's submit!' — Green light given.

6/23 20:22 Appelbaum: 'Love it. Let's submit! Get Outlook for iOS.' — Confirmation.

6/23 20:34 Ryan (sent): 'See attached' — Forwarded final word doc to Appelbaum/mitchellj/howea.

STATUS: Ryan approved. Proposal on Clayco letterhead being prepared/submitted to Gotion. Awaiting Gotion response. Fee=$380,670. Scope=Phase 1 CA support only (not Phase 2).

threads.subject: ASML Electrical gear - Meters
threads.body_text:
ESCALATION — ABB (AJ Baker) following up on unpaid invoice for meters not returned or covered by change order.

6/22 20:05 AJ Baker (ABB): '@Ryan Hankins @Chip Eurillo Following back up on this, we cannot close this job until we get this invoice taken care of. Please help us get this job closed out. ABB will need a Change Order for these or we can have them scheduled to be returned still. If they are not returned, invoices are going to be issued for the full amount owed.'

6/22 21:39 Ryan (sent): '@Graham Ferguson lets discuss when you have a moment' — Deflected to Graham Ferguson internally.

STATUS: ABB demanding resolution. Either: (1) Change Order for meters, or (2) meters returned. Ryan has passed to Graham Ferguson. No indication of resolution yet. CONTRACT/FINANCIAL RISK — invoices threatened if unresolved.

threads.subject: Pac Fusion / Clayco - OCIP Materials
threads.body_text:
OPEN LOOP — OCIP setup for July 1 start. Sarah Shepard (Baldwin) needs first subcontractor list this week.

6/22 13:47 Ryan (sent): 'First 1-2 weeks is primarily Earthwork for the most part. Maybe geopiers / ground improvements. That should be all for first few weeks.'

6/22 14:06 Ryan (sent): 'We don't know who the subcontractors are yet; we don't anticipate being onsite until mid August with earthwork. Currently doing buyout at the moment and there are multiple subcontractors still in the mix. Earthwork — maybe $3mm or so; Ground improvements...'

6/22 14:01 Sarah Shepard (Baldwin): 'Noted thank you Ryan – makes sense. What I need a sense of this week are the first list of subcontractors that will need to be enrolled in the OCIP. Is it 1? 5? 10? Simply need a...' [UNRESOLVED REQUEST]

6/22 14:09 Sarah (final): 'Oh, ok this is even more helpful. We were under the impression that this was in July. Therefore, from our standpoint, while the OCIP will be in place for your July 1 start – it...'

STATUS: Sarah needs subcontractor OCIP enrollment list THIS WEEK. Ryan told her they don't know yet — mid-August start for earthwork. OCIP in place July 1. Sarah still needs a preliminary list. Action needed from Ryan or Schulz to send sub list to Baldwin.

threads.subject: 24.04110 - ClayCo / Ulteig - Gotion Solar
threads.body_text:
DEADLINE — Gotion comments received on Ulteig solar scope. Response due Monday COB.

6/23 19:50 Appelbaum: 'All, We received Gotion's comments today. Please see attached. @Justin Smaaladen Can you please work to have responses in the spreadsheet by next Monday? I would like to get it to Gotion before our meeting on Tuesday. Additionally Jason Hall (Ulteig) would like to set up an alignment meeting before Monday COB to go over the comments prior to submitting. Attachment: Gotion Solar comments spreadsheet.'

STATUS: Gotion comments in hand. Ulteig (Jason Hall) wants alignment meeting before Monday COB (6/28 or 6/29). Justin Smaaladen to populate responses by Monday. Comments need to be returned to Gotion before Tuesday meeting. Ryan cc'd — should ensure Ulteig alignment call happens.
